mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_by, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dept
parent_id = #{parentId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, order_num = #{orderNum}, leader = #{leader}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dept SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.order_num ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC

WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS (SELECT id FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM sys_dept d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id WHERE d.deleted = 0) SELECT id FROM dept_tree
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, COUNT(*) AS userCount FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND dept_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dept_id
